form.formComment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 5.5 m by Heavy Metal Hammer (2:37.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 7 at $12. Sure to be about the mark again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Improved last start with a good run when 3rd (Sr1) over 2130m at Gloucester Park beaten 5.5 m by Heavy Metal Hammer (2:37.70) in 4yo+ NR up to 59 on April 7 at $12. Sure to be about the mark again.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Tightened and steadied in the front straight on the final occasion.

form.formComment: Didn't do much last start, 8th (Fr3) over 2180m at Wagin beaten 30 m by Majic Bay (2:44.10) in 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $151. Before that surrendered the lead and finished 5th (Fr2) over 2242m after showing early speed at Narrogin, beaten 21 m by Art Ideal (2:46.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 65 on March 13 at $32. Others read better. This will test.

form.formComment: Last start 5th (Sr2) over 2185m at Pinjarra beaten 15 m by Ice Cold Sapporo (2:41.30) in 4yo+ 2-4 WINs on April 6 at $51. At the start before 6th (Sr1) over 1177m at Pinjarra, beaten 10 m by Akabah (1:23.10) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $4.60. Solid top-three contender.

form.formComment: Last start 6th (Sr2) over 1177m at Pinjarra, beaten 9 m by You Fly With Me (1:23.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $6.50. Before that, a solid effort when 3rd (Sr1) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 9 m by Beatitlikebeca (1:22.50) in NR up to 55 on March 30 at $5.50. This race appears well within his grasp.

form.formComment: Won three starts back at Pinjarra over 1684m 4yo+ NR 50 to 59 on March 23. Last time out 10th (Sr3) over 1177m at Pinjarra beaten 35 m by You Fly With Me (1:23.30) in 4yo+ NR up to 55 on April 6 at $12. Can do a lot better.

form.formComment: Last start by 3 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Gloucester Park (2:40.90) beating Marbeechsam in 4yo+ 0-1W/17 0K stake on February 27 at $2.90. Key runner once again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Last start by 3 m as favourite when quickly away, (Fr1) at Gloucester Park (2:40.90) beating Marbeechsam in 4yo+ 0-1W/17 0K stake on February 27 at $2.90. Key runner once again.

form.formComment: Two back was beaten by 9 m finishing fourth after being driven well back, behind Ta In Advance at Bunbury over 2100m in a 4yo+ NR 60 to 70 on March 28 at $13. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Sammy Suffarell at Pinjarra over 2185m in a 4yo+ NR up to 65 on April 6 at $17. Nicely placed to take this out.

form.formComment: Solid performance when beaten by 1.4 m finishing second after a quick start, behind Skip A Beat at Wagin over 2180m in a 4yo+ NR up to 69 on March 27 at $7. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third behind Majic Bay at Wagin over 2180m in a 4yo+ NR up to 70 on April 2 at $13. Racing in great heart and is a leading contender.

form.formComment: Resumes today. At the latest first-up run surrendered the lead and finished 10th (Fr3) over 2100m after showing early pace at Bunbury well beaten by It Is Crunch Time (2:34.40) in 3yo 0-2 WINs on September 6 at $12. Facing a tough task first-up.
